---
title: "ABT Question OCR and Dataset generation"
author: "Trey Saddler"
date: "2024-05-29"
---

## Introduction

These questions are from American Board of Toxicology (ABT) exams. The questions are run through OCR using [Surya](https://github.com/VikParuchuri/surya). The dataset is generated to conform to Huggingface's [Datasets](https://huggingface.co/docs/datasets/) library.

## Surya processing

The questions are processed using the following command:

```bash
surya_ocr ../res/dabt-questions --images --langs en --results_dir ../res/dabt-questions-surya
```
